tracks.rawText: 0:07[Rec] Jun 3 19:47:26UploadHardcore hip hop with a heavy boom bap influence, A distorted, overdriven electric guitar riff repeats a two-bar minor key sequence, The drum pattern features a gritty, sampled kick drum and a sharp, high-frequency snare with a slight swing, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the kick drum pattern, Aggressive male vocals are delivered with a rhythmic, percussive flow, The tempo is 92 BPM in the key of C minor, The mix is characterized by high-gain distortion on the melodic elements and a dry, upfront vocal presencePublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] Jun 3 19:47:26

tracks.rawText: 0:07[Rec] Jun 3 19:47:07UploadHip hop with a heavy trap influence, A distorted, saturated 808 bassline plays a syncopated pattern, The percussion consists of a sharp, high-frequency snare and rapid-fire hi-hat rolls with varying velocities, A high-pitched, repetitive synth lead with a slight portamento effect provides the melodic hook, The male vocals are processed with heavy auto-tune and a short slapback delay, delivered in a rhythmic, triplet-heavy flow, 140 BPM, C minorPublishRemix
